pattern: The ball's position follows a periodic pattern with period 2*(n-1); reduce k modulo that period and handle the direction to find the position.
hints: The ball bounces back and forth; positions repeat every 2*(n-1) steps.
Reduce k modulo 2*(n-1); in the first half (k < n) the position is k, in the second half it folds back from n-1.
Alternatively simulate step by step — with n,k ≤ 50 a direct simulation fits in time.

edge_inputs.description: n=2, k=1 ball moves to child 1
n=2, k=2 ball returns to child 0
k equals exact period so back at start
k equals n-1 ball at last child

stress.description: random n and k within constraints
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(2, 50)
    k = rng.randint(1, 50)
    return [n, k]
